ConvEngine is an AI-powered chat SDK that lets you embed intelligent assistants into any React app. It supports custom renderers, rich interactions, dark mode, and connects to your existing backend. 🚀

ConvEngine is a React chat SDK. Drop `<ConvEngineChat>` into any app, point `config.apiHost` at your AI backend, and get a full-featured widget with custom renderers, dark mode, multi-layout support, and more.
ConvEngine is built by **Salil Nair**. It's designed to make embedding AI chat into React apps fast and highly customisable.
Install the npm package → add `<ConvEngineChat config={{ apiHost: '...' }}>` → point it at your AI backend → done! Custom renderers let you show rich interactive UI for structured JSON responses.
ConvEngine Chat is currently at **v1.0.0**. Check the docs or `package.json` for the latest version. New features ship regularly!
Full documentation is available in the Quickstart → Docs section. It covers installation, configuration, custom renderers, theming, and the full API reference.

Install via npm:
```
npm install @salilvnair/convengine-chat
```
Then add:
```jsx
import { ConvEngineChat } from '@salilvnair/convengine-chat';
<ConvEngineChat config={{ apiHost: 'https://your-backend.com' }} />
```

To reset your password: go to the login page, click 'Forgot Password', enter your email address, and follow the link sent to your inbox. The link expires in 30 minutes.

pairs.user: how do i change my email
pairs.agent: To change your email: Settings → Profile → Email. Enter your new address and verify it via the confirmation email we send. Your old email stays active until you confirm the new one.

pairs.user: how to enable two factor authentication
pairs.agent: Enable 2FA: Settings → Security → Two-Factor Authentication → Enable. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy) and enter the 6-digit code to confirm.

Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) adds a second layer of security to your account. After entering your password, you'll also need a one-time code from your authenticator app. This prevents unauthorised access even if your password is compromised.
To cancel your subscription: Settings → Billing → Cancel Plan. You keep access until the end of your current billing cycle. Data is retained for 30 days after cancellation.
To upgrade: Settings → Billing → Change Plan → select your new tier → Confirm. Upgrades are prorated and take effect immediately. Your new features are available instantly.
To add a team member: Settings → Team → Invite Member → enter their email → assign a role (Admin, Editor, Viewer) → Send Invite. They'll receive an email to join your workspace.

To delete your account: Settings → Account → Delete Account. This is permanent and removes all your data. We recommend exporting your data first via Settings → Export. Account deletion takes effect within 24 hours.
The Free plan includes: up to 1,000 messages/month, 1 workspace, basic analytics, and community support. No credit card required. Upgrade to Starter ($9/mo) for higher limits and priority support.
The Pro plan ($29/month) includes: unlimited messages, 5 workspaces, advanced analytics, custom renderers, API access, webhook support, and priority email support. Perfect for growing teams.

The Enterprise plan ($499/month) includes: unlimited everything, SLA guarantees, dedicated support, SSO/SAML, custom contracts, on-premise deployment options, and a dedicated customer success manager.
Contact support via: Email: support@convengine.io · Live chat: click the chat icon in the bottom-right · Docs: docs.convengine.io. Pro/Enterprise customers get priority response within 4 hours.
To report a bug: go to docs.convengine.io/bugs or email bugs@convengine.io with your account ID, steps to reproduce, and a screenshot if possible. Critical bugs are addressed within 24 hours.
Submit feature requests at feedback.convengine.io or upvote existing requests. Top-voted features are reviewed each sprint. Enterprise customers can request features directly with their CSM.

Yes — your data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We are SOC2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. Data is stored in EU or US regions based on your selection. We never sell your data.

The ConvEngine API lets you integrate our chat SDK with any backend. It accepts POST requests at /api/v1/conversation/message and returns structured JSON payloads. Supports custom renderers, enrichment, feedback, and audit trails.

Custom renderers: define a renderer object with { key, match, Component } and pass it in config.renderers. Your Component receives { payload, actions }. Call actions.submit() to send follow-up messages. See the Renderer tab for full examples.

pairs.user: how to set up dark mode
pairs.agent: Dark mode is built in — set config.showDarkModeLightMode: true to show the toggle. Users can switch at any time. You can also force dark mode via the theme prop: theme={{ 'color-scheme': 'dark' }}.
Set the accent color via the theme prop: <ConvEngineChat theme={{ 'color-accent': '#6366f1' }} />. You can use any valid CSS color. The playground on this page lets you preview colors live.

ConvEngine collects: conversation messages, feedback ratings, session metadata (timestamps, conversation IDs), and usage analytics. No personal PII beyond what you send in messages. Full privacy policy at convengine.io/privacy.

Export your data: Settings → Export → choose format (JSON, CSV) → Download. Exports include conversations, feedback, user analytics, and audit logs. Large exports are emailed as a download link within 5 minutes.
ConvEngine supports all modern browsers: Chrome 90+, Firefox 88+, Safari 14+, Edge 90+. Mobile browsers (iOS Safari, Android Chrome) are fully supported. IE11 is not supported.

For Next.js: npm install @salilvnair/convengine-chat → import ConvEngineChat from '@salilvnair/convengine-chat' → add 'use client' at the top of your component → mount <ConvEngineChat config={{ apiHost: '/api' }} />. Works with App Router and Pages Router.

Message Enrichment lets you prepend/append context to every message before it reaches your backend — invisible in the chat UI. Text mode: prefix+text+postfix as a string. JSON mode: { prefix, userText, postfix, ...props } as inputParams. Set via config.messageEnrichment.
